---
title: Running DEA on the UBC sub-clusters
date: 2024-07-04
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Run DEA on the UBC sub-clusters
2. Create heatmap with new markers

# Files and directories

## Input

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240704`

# Process and Results

Using the `clustree` conda environment

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(presto)
```

Loading in the Seurat object
```{r eval=FALSE}
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240704"
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs")
```

Subsetting the human UBCs
```{r eval=FALSE}
# First subset human cells, then subset for UBC cells
ubc_cells <- rl_cca %>%
  subset(subset = species == "human") %>%
  subset(subset = broad_cell_type == "UBC") 
```

Finding the common genes in the UBCs between datasets
```{r eval=FALSE}
DefaultAssay(ubc_cells) <- "RNA"

ald <- subset(ubc_cells, subset = dataset_name == "Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human")
sepp <- subset(ubc_cells, subset = dataset_name == "Sepp_full_cerebellum_human")

counts_ald <- GetAssayData(object = ald, slot = "counts")
nonzero_ald <- counts_ald > 0
keep_ald_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_ald) >= length(Cells(ald))*0.1
ald_genes <- rownames(ald)[keep_ald_genes]

counts_sepp <- GetAssayData(object = sepp, slot = "counts")
nonzero_sepp <- counts_sepp > 0
keep_sepp_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_sepp) >= length(Cells(sepp))*0.1
sepp_genes <- rownames(sepp)[keep_sepp_genes]

intersecting_genes <- intersect(ald_genes, sepp_genes)  
```
```{r eval=FALSE}
> print(length(ald_genes))
[1] 2083

> print(length(sepp_genes))
[1] 1982

> print(length(intersecting_genes))
[1] 1655
```

Let find the markers now
```{r eval=FALSE}
# Subsetting for intersecting genes
ubc_cells <- subset(ubc_cells, features = intersecting_genes) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA")

# Re-leveling 
ubc_cells$new_clusters <- factor(ubc_cells$new_clusters, levels = unique(ubc_cells$new_clusters))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(ubc_cells$new_clusters),
  numeric = TRUE
)
ubc_cells$new_clusters <- fct_relevel(ubc_cells$new_clusters, levels(ubc_cells$new_clusters)[levels_index])

# Determining the markers
ubc_markers <- wilcoxauc(
  ubc_cells,
  group_by = "new_clusters",
  assay = "data",
  seurat_assay = "RNA"
)

write.csv(ubc_markers, file = paste0(out_directory, "/ubc_markers.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

ubc_markers %>%
    mutate(group = factor(group, levels = levels(ubc_cells$new_clusters))) %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    dplyr::filter(logFC > 0.5, padj < 0.05) %>%
    arrange(group, desc(logFC)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 10) %>%
    ungroup() -> top_features

write.csv(top_features, file = paste0(out_directory, "/ubc_top_markers.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

Now lets switch environments and take the markers to plot on a heatmap.

Using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
```

Loading in the Seurat object
```{r eval=FALSE}
set.seed(1)
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240704"
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs")
```

Reordering the markers
```{r eval=FALSE}
markers <- read.csv("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240704/ubc_top_markers.csv")
custom_order <- c("UBC_5", "UBC_1", "UBC_0", "UBC_3", "UBC_4", "UBC_2")

markers$group <- factor(markers$group, levels = custom_order)
ordered_markers <- markers %>% arrange(group, logFC)
```

Subsetting the human UBCs
```{r eval=FALSE}
# First subset human cells, then subset for UBC cells, then Normalize
ubc_cells <- rl_cca %>%
  subset(subset = species == "human") %>%
  subset(subset = broad_cell_type == "UBC") %>%
  NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") 

# Setting the Variable Features as the markers so ScaleData() scales it
VariableFeatures(ubc_cells) <- unique(ordered_markers$feature) 
ubc_cells <- ScaleData(ubc_cells, vars.to.regress = "CC.Difference", assay = "RNA")
```

Lets plot the data slot for the matrix
```{r eval=FALSE}
# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
ubc_data <- GetAssayData(ubc_cells, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Added EOMES and LMX1A to features to plot as a santity check
feats <- c(VariableFeatures(ubc_cells), "EOMES", "LMX1A")

# Converting to matrix form
ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data[feats, ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters","dataset_name")
ubc_metadata <- ubc_cells@meta.data[, columns]

ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- factor(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$new_clusters))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters),
  numeric = TRUE
)
ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- fct_relevel(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters)[levels_index])

ubc_metadata$dataset_name <- factor(ubc_metadata$dataset_name, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$dataset_name))

ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data_matrix[, rownames(ubc_metadata)]
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
png(file.path(out_directory, "ubc_data_heatmap.png"),width=30,height=30,units="in",res=600)

# Setting colour pallette
num_clusters <- length(levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters))
num_datasets <- length(levels(ubc_metadata$dataset_name))

palette <- brewer.pal(num_clusters + num_datasets, "Dark2")

cluster_palette <- palette[1:num_clusters]
names(cluster_palette) <- levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters)

dataset_palette <- palette[(num_clusters + 1):(num_clusters + num_datasets)]
names(dataset_palette) <- levels(ubc_metadata$dataset_name)

# Column annotation
column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = ubc_metadata$new_clusters,
  Dataset = ubc_metadata$dataset_name,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette,
    Dataset = dataset_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE,  
    "Dataset" = FALSE  
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE,
  simple_anno_size = unit(0.5, "in")
)

cluster_legend <- Legend(labels = names(cluster_palette), 
    title = "UBC Subclusters", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = cluster_palette))

dataset_legend <- Legend(labels = names(dataset_palette), 
    title = "Datasets", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = dataset_palette))

# Heatmap
heatmap_col <- brewer.pal(9, "Blues")

ubc_heatmap <- Heatmap(ubc_data_matrix,
    col = heatmap_col,
    top_annotation = column_annotation,
    width = unit(20, "in"), height = unit(20, "in"),
    row_title = "Marker Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_km = 4,
    column_dend_height = unit(3, "in"),
    column_dend_reorder = FALSE,
    row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_names_side = "left",
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

draw(ubc_heatmap, 
    ht_gap = unit(1, "in"),
    heatmap_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_list = list(cluster_legend, dataset_legend))

dev.off()
```

![The cells are sorted based on their age](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240704/ubc_data_heatmap.png)

Lets plot the scale.data slot for the matrix

```{r eval=FALSE}
# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
ubc_data <- GetAssayData(ubc_cells, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")

feats <- c(VariableFeatures(ubc_cells))

# Converting to matrix form
ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data[feats, ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters","dataset_name")
ubc_metadata <- ubc_cells@meta.data[, columns]

ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- factor(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$new_clusters))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters),
  numeric = TRUE
)
ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- fct_relevel(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters)[levels_index])

ubc_metadata$dataset_name <- factor(ubc_metadata$dataset_name, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$dataset_name))

ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data_matrix[, rownames(ubc_metadata)]
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
png(file.path(out_directory, "ubc_scale.data_heatmap.png"),width=30,height=30,units="in",res=600)

# Setting colour pallette
num_clusters <- length(levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters))
num_datasets <- length(levels(ubc_metadata$dataset_name))

palette <- brewer.pal(num_clusters + num_datasets, "Dark2")

cluster_palette <- palette[1:num_clusters]
names(cluster_palette) <- levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters)

dataset_palette <- palette[(num_clusters + 1):(num_clusters + num_datasets)]
names(dataset_palette) <- levels(ubc_metadata$dataset_name)

# Column annotation
column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = ubc_metadata$new_clusters,
  Dataset = ubc_metadata$dataset_name,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette,
    Dataset = dataset_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE,  
    "Dataset" = FALSE  
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE,
  simple_anno_size = unit(0.5, "in")
)

cluster_legend <- Legend(labels = names(cluster_palette), 
    title = "UBC Subclusters", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = cluster_palette))

dataset_legend <- Legend(labels = names(dataset_palette), 
    title = "Datasets", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = dataset_palette))

# Heatmap
heatmap_col <- brewer.pal(5, "RdBu")
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2), heatmap_col)

ubc_heatmap <- Heatmap(ubc_data_matrix,
    col = col_fun,
    top_annotation = column_annotation,
    width = unit(20, "in"), height = unit(20, "in"),
    row_title = "Marker Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_km = 4,
    column_dend_height = unit(3, "in"),
    column_dend_reorder = FALSE,
    row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_names_side = "left",
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

draw(ubc_heatmap, 
    ht_gap = unit(1, "in"),
    heatmap_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_list = list(cluster_legend, dataset_legend))

dev.off()
```

![The scale.data provides a better view into the gene programs](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240704/ubc_scale.data_heatmap.png)

Lets plot the heatmap sorted by our clusters
```{r eval=FALSE}
# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
ubc_data <- GetAssayData(ubc_cells, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")

feats <- c(VariableFeatures(ubc_cells))

# Converting to matrix form
ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data[feats, ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters","dataset_name")
ubc_metadata <- ubc_cells@meta.data[, columns]

custom_order <- c("UBC_5", "UBC_1", "UBC_0", "UBC_3", "UBC_4", "UBC_2")

ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- factor(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels = custom_order)
ubc_metadata <- arrange(ubc_metadata, new_clusters)

ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- factor(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$new_clusters))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters),
  numeric = TRUE
)
ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- fct_relevel(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters)[levels_index])

ubc_metadata$dataset_name <- factor(ubc_metadata$dataset_name, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$dataset_name))

ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data_matrix[, rownames(ubc_metadata)]
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
png(file.path(out_directory, "sorted_ubc_scale.data_heatmap.png"),width=30,height=30,units="in",res=600)

# Setting colour pallette
num_clusters <- length(levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters))
num_datasets <- length(levels(ubc_metadata$dataset_name))

palette <- brewer.pal(num_clusters + num_datasets, "Dark2")

cluster_palette <- palette[1:num_clusters]
names(cluster_palette) <- levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters)

dataset_palette <- palette[(num_clusters + 1):(num_clusters + num_datasets)]
names(dataset_palette) <- levels(ubc_metadata$dataset_name)

# Column annotation
column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = ubc_metadata$new_clusters,
  Dataset = ubc_metadata$dataset_name,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette,
    Dataset = dataset_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE,  
    "Dataset" = FALSE  
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE,
  simple_anno_size = unit(0.5, "in")
)

cluster_legend <- Legend(labels = names(cluster_palette), 
    title = "UBC Subclusters", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = cluster_palette))

dataset_legend <- Legend(labels = names(dataset_palette), 
    title = "Datasets", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = dataset_palette))

# Heatmap
heatmap_col <- brewer.pal(5, "RdBu")
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2), heatmap_col)

ubc_heatmap <- Heatmap(ubc_data_matrix,
    col = col_fun,
    top_annotation = column_annotation,
    width = unit(20, "in"), height = unit(20, "in"),
    row_title = "Marker Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    row_names_side = "left",
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

draw(ubc_heatmap, 
    ht_gap = unit(1, "in"),
    heatmap_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_list = list(cluster_legend, dataset_legend))

dev.off()
```

![The scale.data provides a better view into the gene programs](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240704/sorted_ubc_scale.data_heatmap.png)
